category_sources: source_facts.description says Redis re-implemented with SQLite; official GitHub README says Redka reimplements Redis-compatible core parts with SQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is redka; official GitHub README uses Redka.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and docs directory are the primary documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nalgeon/redka; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQLite and Redis compatibility; official README says Redka uses SQLite or PostgreSQL and implements Redis commands and protocol.
